steps.title: Separate two complete ideas
steps.content: The first idea identifies Juab High School and Park City High School as Utah schools with hillside geoglyphs. The next idea gives examples of those geoglyphs. These should be two separate sentences.

steps.title: Choose the sentence break
steps.content: Choice A creates a comma splice. Choice B incorrectly separates the essential clause after schools and joins the examples awkwardly. Choice D has the same faulty comma after schools and an awkward conjunction. The period creates the needed break. The answer is C.
